source_artifact_id.description: Preferred PopiArt artifact ID for the source audio or video file.

audio_url.description: Fallback stable audio URL when no source_artifact_id exists.

video_url.description: Fallback stable video URL when server-side audio extraction is needed.

backend.description: Optional managed route hint such as auto, whisper, or parakeet when supported.

timestamps.description: Whether timestamped transcript output is requested.

format.description: Preferred transcript output format such as text, json, srt, or vtt.

prompt.description: Optional recognition hint or vocabulary guidance.

notes.description: Optional extra constraints confirmed with the user.
